name: Colombian Avocado Vichyssoise (Sopa De Aguacate y Papas)
recipeIngredient: 2 medium potatoes, peeled and sliced thinly
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the stock in a medium saucepan.
2. Add leeks and potatoes; bring to a boil.
3. Reduce heat and simmer until tender (about 20 minutes).
4. Puree the mixture in a blender.
5. Return to the saucepan and stir in the heavy cream.
6. Puree the avocado separately.
7. If serving hot, stir in the avocado just before serving.
8. If serving cold, let the stock cool, then stir in the avocado puree and refrigerate.
9. Serve with minced chives or cilantro.
10. This rich and delicate soup serves 6 people well as a first course, ideally served before a fish course.
